# x-twitter-scraper_monitor_keyword (Resource)

Real-time X account monitoring



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `event_types` (List of String) Array of event types to subscribe to.
- `query` (String) X search query to monitor. Whitespace is normalized.

### Optional

- `is_active` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `next_billing_at` (String) Next hourly credit charge time for this keyword query monitor.
